title: Raphinha Jersey Reveal
scenario: a verified Kling X prompt focused on She begins standing still, facing camera with a, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X post explicitly mentions Kling and includes visible prompt text in the original post body. Metrics are captured from the X tweet snapshot.
action: Use the original Kling prompt for She begins standing still, facing camera with a as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt:
She begins standing still, facing camera with a calm confident expression. Slowly she raises one hand to lift her hair off her neck, then turns away from the camera revealing "RAPHINHA 11" printed in gold on the back of her Barcelona jersey. She gazes out over the stadium pitch. Her hair lifts and settles naturally in a light wind. The giant Barcelona tifo mosaic on the pitch fills the background. Camera holds a steady handheld medium shot with subtle organic sway. Overcast daylight, cool diffused light, cinematic 4K, realistic hair movement, authentic pre-match stadium energy.

GPT Image 2 prompt: Photorealistic photograph of a young woman with fair skin, medium-length straight dark brown hair, and natural minimal makeup standing in the lower stands of a large football stadium. She wears an FC Barcelona home jersey — navy blue and deep burgundy vertical split, gold Spotify logo on chest, FC Barcelona crest. Dark trousers. She faces the camera directly with a calm, confident, composed expression. Overcast daylight, soft diffused natural light on her face. Behind her: open-air stadium with a giant Barcelona crest tifo mosaic covering the pitch, partially filled stands visible in the distance. Handheld editorial photography style, shallow depth of field, subject sharp, stadium background softly blurred. 4K, cinematic color grade, cool neutral tones, no filters, hyper-realistic skin texture, natural hair detail, authentic stadium atmosphere.

title: Mountain Waterfall Meadow
scenario: a verified Kling X prompt focused on A vast open under bright daylight, covered with, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X post explicitly mentions Kling and includes visible prompt text in the original post body. Metrics are captured from the X tweet snapshot.
action: Use the original Kling prompt for A vast open under bright daylight, covered with as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt:
A vast open  under bright daylight, covered with tall, wild grass gently moving in the wind. In the far distance, enormous green mountains rise high into the sky, their peaks covered with snow. Large waterfalls flow down from the mountains, creating mist and a dramatic natural background. The entire environment feels grand, cinematic, and alive.

In the center of the field stands a giant ape, massive and powerful, similar to a legendary movie creature. The ape is standing upright in the grass, looking alert and dominant. It is holding a large, heavy machine gun (LMG-style), designed in a cinematic and slightly futuristic way.

Suddenly, from the mountain area near the waterfalls, 5 to 10 giant dinosaurs begin to appear. They move quickly and spread out, surrounding the field from all directions. Their heavy footsteps shake the ground, and their loud roars echo across the landscape, building tension.

The giant ape reacts immediately. It starts turning in all directions, rotating its body while firing the machine gun. The weapon shoots fast, spinning projectiles or glowing impact shots across the field. The ape continuously sweeps the gun left and right, covering every direction as the dinosaurs approach.

As the shots hit the dinosaurs, they react strongly—roaring loudly, stumbling, and falling to the ground or being pushed back. Dust rises from the grass as they collapse. The focus is on cinematic action and intensity, without any graphic detail.

The ape becomes more intense, roaring loudly while continuing to fire in all directions. Its expression shows power and anger. The camera captures wide-angle shots of the battlefield, close-ups of the ape, and slow-motion moments of action, making the scene feel like a big movie.

The grass moves with the wind and action, dust fills the air, and the sound of waterfalls continues in the background. The snowy mountains and flowing water create a strong contrast with the intense action in the field.

At the climax, one large dinosaur manages to get very close to the ape, charging directly toward it. At the last moment, the ape quickly adjusts its aim and fires a powerful burst. The dinosaur reacts dramatically and falls right near the ape’s feet.

The ape stands strong in the middle of the field, breathing heavily, holding the weapon, and letting out a loud, powerful roar. The camera slowly pulls back, showing the wide field, the mountains, waterfalls, and the dramatic aftermath.

The scene should be ultra-realistic, cinematic, high detail, with smooth camera movement, dramatic lighting, natural colors, and an epic action atmosphere.

title: Flowing Skirt Bird Spin
scenario: a verified Kling X prompt focused on -- A woman in a flowing skirt and, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X post explicitly mentions Kling and includes visible prompt text in the original post body. Metrics are captured from the X tweet snapshot.
action: Use the original Kling prompt for -- A woman in a flowing skirt and as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt:
-- A woman in a flowing skirt and fluffy coat spins as birds fly past her. Clouds drift and form in the sky. The camera dollies out. --
The spin of the woman in the prompt was intentional, designed to stress-test facial consistency after the first spin and show how well motion in both the subject and background is handled.
To keep the test fair:
• Same prompt across all models
• Highest available resolution per model
• Three generations per tool, best one selected
Results (22nd August 2025):
Seedance – actually feels like HD, minimal morphing, great visual consistency
Hailuo 02 – Organic movement, decent consistency
Wan 2.2 – hands morph a little, the face stays pretty intact, feels like it’s dropping frames
Veo 3 – great prompt adherence, awkward movement, lower resolution
Midjourney HD – instant face morphing, lower resolution, though great style consistency
Kling 2.1 Master – pretty horrible face morphing going on, not suitable for professional work
I am surprised how well Seedance is performing and how poorly Kling 2.1 is. However, this is just one test. Did I miss anything?

prompt: "Extreme macro close-up shot of a human thumb slowly scrolling on a white Apple iPod Classic click wheel. Shallow depth of field. Warm soft golden-hour light from the left. title: Cluttered Living Room Sitdown
scenario: a verified Kling X prompt focused on A filthy, cluttered living room with a sagging, preserving the original source language, camera intent, motion cues, and visible generation instructions
description: The source X post explicitly mentions Kling and includes visible prompt text in the original post body. Metrics are captured from the X tweet snapshot.
action: Use the original Kling prompt for A filthy, cluttered living room with a sagging as a video-generation structure with your own subject, setting, camera path, and duration constraints.
prompt:
“A filthy, cluttered living room with a sagging recliner at center frame. The camera is static. A heavy man in a stained tank top, robe, and boxers shuffles in, slumps into the chair, lifts the footrest, and turns on the TV.”

👉 Then for the reverse angle of the TV with sock puppets, again we will choose Veo in the Arcade action bar and now use this prompt:

“A grimy, dim room with an old CRT TV on a dirty floor amid trash and papers. The camera faces the screen showing a bright sock-puppet show, its flickering light illuminating the filthy walls.”

👉 For the next channel with the wrestler we will again use Veo with the prompt:

“Close-up shot of a Mexican lucha libre wrestler inside a wrestling ring, wearing a colorful mask yelling into the camera.”

👉 For the next channel with the hotline woman asking you to call her, we first create the image of the woman. Click on the "Image" tab in the Arcade Action bar and choose your favorite image model. (nano banana, Seedance, or Imagen) Then use the following prompt:

“Close-up of a blonde woman in a black dress under soft studio light, staring into the camera. 80s–90s VHS aesthetic with video noise, warm tones, blue backdrop, bold makeup, red lips — like a late-night hotline ad.”

👉 I then decided she should be brunet. To do this load the image in Nano Banana, Seedance, or Qwen and simple prompt:

"Change her hair to brunet"

👉 Once we have the image of the woman we will create her voice in by click on the "Audio" tab in the Arcade Action bar. Just prompt what ever you'd like your actor to say!

👉 Now back to the "Video" tab and select OmniHuman, drag and drop the image of the woman and the voice you created to create a video of her speaking the dialog you created.

👉 For the final channel with the Alien new anchors we again choose Veo in the "Video" tab and use the following prompt:

“Two alien news anchors at a retro 70s desk. First says, ‘This just in — Arcade Studio is the number one site for world building.’ Second replies, ‘Yes, even if that world is a gross dude’s apartment.’ Funny, cinematic sci-fi broadcast.”

👉 Editing was done in DaVinche DaVinci Resolve

Give it a try!! 😁
